ash
Download Verify Docs GitHub

Verify Your ash ISO

Every release is signed with 4 independent mechanisms. Verify before you boot.

Current Release: v2025.01.15

ISO File
ash-2025.01.15.iso
Size
2,469,396,480 bytes (2.3 GB)
SHA256
a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2
minisign Public Key
RWQf6LRCGA9i52mlZT2k5B5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y=
minisign Signature
ash-2025.01.15.iso.minisig
cosign Bundle
ash-2025.01.15.iso.cosign.bundle
SLSA Provenance
provenance.intoto.jsonl
Signing Identity
https://github.com/ash-linux/ash/.github/workflows/release.yml@refs/tags/v*
OIDC Issuer
https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com

Verification Steps

1. Verify SHA256 (Basic Integrity)

# Linux / macOS
sha256sum ash-2025.01.15.iso

# Windows PowerShell
Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 ash-2025.01.15.iso

# Compare output to:
a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2

Match? → Proceed. Mismatch? → Delete. Do not boot.

2. Verify minisign (Recommended — Fast, Offline, Ed25519)

minisign -Vm ash-2025.01.15.iso -P RWQf6LRCGA9i52mlZT2k5B5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y= -x ash-2025.01.15.iso.minisig
# Expected: "Signature and comment signature verified"

Good signature? → Proceed. Bad signature? → Delete. Do not boot.

3. Verify cosign (Keyless + Sigstore Transparency Log)

cosign verify-blob \
  --bundle ash-2025.01.15.iso.cosign.bundle \
  --certificate-identity-regexp "https://github.com/ash-linux/ash/.github/workflows/release.yml@refs/tags/v*" \
  --certificate-oidc-issuer "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com" \
  ash-2025.01.15.iso
# Expected: "Verified OK"

Verified OK? → Proceed. Failed? → Delete. Do not boot.

4. Verify SLSA Level 3 Provenance (Build Attestation)

slsa-verifier verify-artifact \
  ash-2025.01.15.iso \
  --provenance-path provenance.intoto.jsonl \
  --source-uri github.com/ash-linux/ash \
  --source-tag v2025.01.15 \
  --builder-id "https://github.com/ash-linux/ash/.github/workflows/build-iso.yml@refs/heads/main"
# Expected: "PASSED: Verified SLSA Provenance"

PASSED? → Proceed. FAILED? → Delete. Do not boot.

Verify All at Once (Recommended)

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# verify-ash.sh — Run all verifications on ash ISO
set -euo pipefail

ISO="${1:?ISO file required}"
VERSION="2025.01.15"

echo "=== Verifying $ISO ==="

echo "[1/4] SHA256..."
sha256sum -c "ash-${VERSION}.iso.sha256" || { echo "SHA256 FAILED"; exit 1; }
echo "SHA256 OK"

echo "[2/4] minisign..."
minisign -Vm "$ISO" -P RWQf6LRCGA9i52mlZT2k5B5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y5Q5Y= -x "ash-${VERSION}.iso.minisig" || { echo "minisign FAILED"; exit 1; }
echo "minisign OK"

echo "[3/4] cosign..."
cosign verify-blob \
  --bundle "ash-${VERSION}.iso.cosign.bundle" \
  --certificate-identity-regexp "https://github.com/ash-linux/ash/.github/workflows/release.yml@refs/tags/v*" \
  --certificate-oidc-issuer "https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com" \
  "$ISO" || { echo "cosign FAILED"; exit 1; }
echo "cosign OK"

echo "[4/4] SLSA provenance..."
slsa-verifier verify-artifact \
  "$ISO" \
  --provenance-path "provenance.intoto.jsonl" \
  --source-uri "github.com/ash-linux/ash" \
  --source-tag "v${VERSION}" \
  --builder-id "https://github.com/ash-linux/ash/.github/workflows/build-iso.yml@refs/heads/main" || { echo "SLSA FAILED"; exit 1; }
echo "SLSA OK"

echo "ALL VERIFICATIONS PASSED — Safe to boot!"
